nodes.itemHTML: • Plockle - A spatial block puzzle game with over 40 levels.
• Castle Builder - A collaborative and cross-platform castle-building game utilizing a unique Unity-to-three.js pipeline.

• Fastfinderstars160 - Fast customisable cross-platform suspicious file finder. Supports md5/sha1/sha256 hashs, litteral/wildcard strings, regular expressions and YARA rules. Can easily be packed to be deployed on any windows / linux host.
• MTFstars17 - A Modbus/TCP Fuzzer for testing internetworked industrial systems
• Carrd - Simple, free, fully responsive one-page sites for pretty much anything.
• json-buildstars28 - A minimalistic serializer in C. It can be easily integrated into the resource-limited projects or embedded systems.

• MetaTubestars122 ⚠ - A Web GUI to automatically download music from YouTube add metadata from Spotify, Deezer or Musicbrainz. GPL-3.0 Python
• wantguns/binstars79 - Minimal pastebin for both textual and binary files shipped in a single statically linked binary. (Demo) GPL-3.0 Rust

• Grist - Grist is a next-generation spreadsheet with relational structure, formula-based access control, and a portable, self-contained format. Alternative to Airtable. (Demo, Source Codestars3.4k) Apache-2.0 Nodejs/Python
• JARR - JARR (Just Another RSS Reader) is a web-based news aggregator and reader (fork of Newspipe). (Demo, Source Codestars99) AGPL-3.0 Python
• Gitpod - Automated cloud dev environments.

• Coupler - Data integration tool that syncs between apps. It can create live dashboards and reports, transform and manipulate values, collect and back up insights. The free plan has unlimited users, 100 runs with 1000 rows a month and unlimited integrations.
• gfmstars2 - D gamedev toolkit.
• Upstash Kafka - Serverless Kafka Cloud offering with per-request-pricing. It has a free tier with max 10000 messages per day.

• Precious Plastic - Tools to make plastic recycling as simple as possible.

• Storj — Decentralised Private Cloud Storage for Apps and Developers. Free plan provides 3 Projects, 50 GB storage per project/month , 50 GB bandwidth per project/month.

    Demo, Docs, Repostars2.6k | #CSS #PostCSS
